                    assert rPr.get('b') in (None, '0'), f'Slide {slide_num}: b={rPr.get(\\\"b\\\")}'
                    solid = rPr.find('a:solidFill/a:srgbClr', NS)
                    assert solid is not None, f'Slide {slide_num}: Missing solidFill'
                    assert solid.get('val') == '989596', f'Slide {slide_num}: color={solid.get(\\\"val\\\")}'
                    latin = rPr.find('a:latin', NS)
                    assert latin is not None and latin.get('typeface') == 'Arial', f'Slide {slide_num}: latin wrong'
        
        assert len(title_texts) == 1, f'Slide {slide_num}: found {len(title_texts)} titles: {title_texts}'
        
        from rapidfuzz import fuzz
        score = fuzz.ratio(title_texts[0], GT_TITLE[slide_num])
        assert score >= 90, f'Slide {slide_num}: title mismatch ({score}): {title_texts[0]} vs {GT_TITLE[slide_num]}'
        print(f'Slide {slide_num}: OK - \\\"{title_texts[0]}\\\" (score={score})')

print('All checks passed"'!'"')

/bin/bash -lc "cd /root && python3 -c \"
import zipfile, re
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET

NS = {
    'a': 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main',
    'p': 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/presentationml/2006/main',
}

def looks_like_title(text):
    t = ' '.join(text.split())
    if len(t) < 15 or len(t) > 160: return False
    lowered = t.lower()
    if any(token in lowered for token in ['http://', 'https://', 'www.', 'doi', 'arxiv']): return False
    if re.search(r'\\b(19|20)\\d{2}\\b', t): return False
    if re.search(r'[\\\"\\u201c].+[\\\"\\u201d]', t): return True
    words = re.findall(r\\\"[A-Za-z][A-Za-z\\-']*\\\", t)
    if len(words) < 4 or len(words) > 20: return False
    title_case_ratio = sum(1 for w in words if w[0].isupper()) / len(words)
    if title_case_ratio >= 0.6: return True
    if (':' in t or ' - ' in t) and title_case_ratio >= 0.5: return True
    return False

def paragraph_text(p):
    return ''.join(t.text or '' for t in p.findall('.//a:t', NS))

def build_parent_map(root):
    return {child: parent for parent in root.iter() for child in parent}

def find_shape_for_paragraph(paragraph, parent_map):
    current = paragraph
    while current in parent_map:
        current = parent_map[current]
        if current.tag.endswith('}sp'):
            return current
    return None

with zipfile.ZipFile('/root/Awesome-Agent-Papers_processed.pptx', 'r') as z:
    # Get slide dimensions
    data = z.read('ppt/presentation.xml')
    root = ET.fromstring(data)
    sld_sz = root.find('.//p:sldSz', NS)
    slide_cx, slide_cy = int(sld_sz.get('cx')), int(sld_sz.get('cy'))
    print(f'Slide: {slide_cx} x {slide_cy}')
    
    slide_names = sorted(
        (n for n in z.namelist() if n.startswith('ppt/slides/slide') and n.endswith('.xml')),
        key=lambda n: int(re.search(r'slide(\\d+)', n).group(1))
    )
    
    # Check positioning for slides 2-6
    for slide_num in [2, 3, 4, 5, 6]:
        root = ET.fromstring(z.read(slide_names[slide_num - 1]))
        parent_map = build_parent_map(root)
        
        for p in root.findall('.//a:p', NS):
            text = ' '.join(paragraph_text(p).split())
            if not looks_like_title(text):
                continue
            
            shape = find_shape_for_paragraph(p, parent_map)
            xfrm = shape.find('p:spPr/a:xfrm', NS) if shape is not None else None
            off = xfrm.find('a:off', NS) if xfrm is not None else None
            ext = xfrm.find('a:ext', NS) if xfrm is not None else None
            
            x, y = int(off.get('x')), int(off.get('y'))
            cx, cy = int(ext.get('cx')), int(ext.get('cy'))
            
            # Check bottom half
            assert y > slide_cy / 2, f'Slide {slide_num}: title not in bottom half (y={y}, mid={slide_cy/2})'
            
            # Check horizontal centering
            box_center = x + cx / 2
            slide_center = slide_cx / 2
            tolerance = slide_cx * 0.1
            assert abs(box_center - slide_center) < tolerance, f'Slide {slide_num}: not centered (box_center={box_center}, slide_center={slide_center})'
            
            # Check width is enough for single line (cx should be > some threshold)
            assert cx > slide_cx * 0.5, f'Slide {slide_num}: box too narrow (cx={cx})'
            
            print(f'Slide {slide_num}: Position OK (x={x}, y={y}, cx={cx}, cy={cy})')
    
    # Check Reference slide (last slide)
    last_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(slide_names[-1]))
    
    # Check title
    title_found = False
    for sp in last_root.findall('.//p:sp', NS):
        nvPr = sp.find('.//p:nvSpPr/p:nvPr', NS)
        ph = nvPr.find('p:ph', NS) if nvPr is not None else None
        if ph is not None and ph.get('type') == 'title':
            text = ''.join(t.text or '' for t in sp.findall('.//a:t', NS))
            assert 'Reference' in text, f'Title should be Reference, got: {text}'
            title_found = True
            print(f'Reference slide title: \\\"{text}\\\"')
    assert title_found, 'No title found on Reference slide'
    
    # Check body has 4 unique papers with auto-numbering
    for sp in last_root.findall('.//p:sp', NS):
        nvPr = sp.find('.//p:nvSpPr/p:nvPr', NS)
        ph = nvPr.find('p:ph', NS) if nvPr is not None else None
        if ph is not None and ph.get('idx') == '1':
            paragraphs = sp.findall('.//a:p', NS)
            paper_texts = []
            for p in paragraphs:
                text = ''.join(t.text or '' for t in p.findall('.//a:t', NS)).strip()
                if text:
                    paper_texts.append(text)
                    # Check auto-numbering
                    pPr = p.find('a:pPr', NS)
                    buAutoNum = pPr.find('a:buAutoNum', NS) if pPr is not None else None
                    assert buAutoNum is not None, f'Missing buAutoNum for: {text}'
            
            print(f'Reference slide papers ({len(paper_texts)}):')
            for i, t in enumerate(paper_texts, 1):
                print(f'  {i}. {t}')
            
            assert len(paper_texts) == 4, f'Expected 4 unique papers, got {len(paper_texts)}'
            # Check no duplicates
            assert len(set(paper_texts)) == len(paper_texts), 'Duplicate papers found'

print('\\nAll comprehensive checks passed"'!'"')
\" 2>&1"
